name: io.github.bonesdefi/tripwire
title: Tripwire
description: Security gateway for MCP agents: blocks prompt-injection-driven tool calls before they execute.

io.github.bonesdefi/tripwire.note: Tripwire is a proxy that sits in front of your real MCP servers, not a turnkey server. Run `tripwire init` once to generate tripwire.yaml (the --config above) before launching.
